decision_reason: Repair rejected because required proof failed: fixed_target, holdout_target

gates.detail: patched fixed and holdout critical counters are zero
patched fixed and holdout validity meet threshold
deterministic policy produced no hidden failure
fixed and holdout persona alignment decline is bounded
patched cohorts do not add unknown or pipeline-stalled endings
designed failure remains possible and is not reclassified

hypothesis: When spendable cash reaches crisis range, the recurring cash-shortfall stress feedback is applied strongly enough that aligned non-failure personas cannot recover before entering the cashflow/stress attractor; one bounded reduction or cap in that feedback should delay or prevent first entry without removing designed failure endings.

patch.diff:
diff --git a/scripts/simulation/SimulationEngine.gd b/scripts/simulation/SimulationEngine.gd
index dd4363a8f36e3d0e9c53ccb5ad17291666d59d0a..2c07bb3d92eadefd8dfc03e99bafc79254a00409 100644
--- a/scripts/simulation/SimulationEngine.gd
+++ b/scripts/simulation/SimulationEngine.gd
@@ -4,6 +4,7 @@ extends RefCounted
 const ActionResolverScript := preload("res://scripts/simulation/ActionResolver.gd")
 const EventResolverScript := preload("res://scripts/simulation/EventResolver.gd")
 const MAX_ACTION_SLOTS := 4
+const MAX_CRISIS_DRIFT_STRESS_INCREASE := 8
 
 var planned_actions: Array = []
 var last_week_summary: Array = []
@@ -71,7 +72,7 @@ func resolve_week():
 	var released_amount: int = state.get_blocked_account_release_for_week()
 	if released_amount > 0:
 		last_life_drift_effects["money"] = int(last_life_drift_effects.get("money", 0)) + released_amount
-	var drift: Array = state.apply_weekly_drift()
+	var drift: Array = apply_bounded_cashflow_stress_drift(state)
 	week_summary.append("生活开销与自然恢复：%s" % ", ".join(drift))
 	planned_actions.clear()
 	last_week_summary = week_summary
@@ -82,6 +83,17 @@ func resolve_week():
 		_event_bus().event_ready.emit(event)
 	return event
 
+func apply_bounded_cashflow_stress_drift(state: Node) -> Array:
+	var stress_before_drift: int = int(state.stress)
+	var drift: Array = state.apply_weekly_drift()
+	var crisis_active: bool = state.arrears_amount > 0 or state.flags.has("cashflow_crisis")
+	var applied_stress: int = int(state.stress) - stress_before_drift
+	if crisis_active and applied_stress > MAX_CRISIS_DRIFT_STRESS_INCREASE:
+		var excess: int = applied_stress - MAX_CRISIS_DRIFT_STRESS_INCREASE
+		state.stress -= excess
+		last_life_drift_effects["stress"] = int(last_life_drift_effects.get("stress", 0)) - excess
+	return drift
+
 func finish_week() -> void:
 	var state: Node = _state()
 	if state.week < 20:
diff --git a/scripts/tools/ValidateEconomyRules.gd b/scripts/tools/ValidateEconomyRules.gd
index 084016a414f7b0fd93c07932a09360896ba04064..cf96f57caa71be32f1de025d5373a1336a661c24 100644
--- a/scripts/tools/ValidateEconomyRules.gd
+++ b/scripts/tools/ValidateEconomyRules.gd
@@ -1,6 +1,7 @@
 extends SceneTree
 
 const EventResolverScript := preload("res://scripts/simulation/EventResolver.gd")
+const SimulationEngineScript := preload("res://scripts/simulation/SimulationEngine.gd")
 
 func _init() -> void:
 	call_deferred("_run")
@@ -24,6 +25,7 @@ func _run() -> void:
 
 	_validate_runtime_work_income(game_state, errors)
 	_validate_cashflow_guardrails(game_state, errors)
+	_validate_crisis_stress_feedback(game_state, errors)
 	_validate_monthly_rent(game_state, errors)
 	_validate_social_maintenance(game_state, errors)
 	_validate_friend_borrowing(game_state, errors)
@@ -85,6 +87,23 @@ func _validate_cashflow_guardrails(game_state: Node, errors: Array[String]) -> v
 	if not game_state.flags.has("arrears") or not game_state.flags.has("cash_shortfall"):
 		errors.append("cash shortfall should set arrears and cash_shortfall flags")
 
+func _validate_crisis_stress_feedback(game_state: Node, errors: Array[String]) -> void:
+	var engine = SimulationEngineScript.new()
+	game_state.reset()
+	game_state.week = 2
+	game_state.blocked_account_balance = 0
+	game_state.money = 0
+	game_state.arrears_amount = 700
+	game_state.cash_shortfall_count = 2
+	game_state.stress = 40
+	game_state.hunger = 80
+	game_state.set_flag("cashflow_crisis")
+	var stress_before: int = game_state.stress
+	engine.last_life_drift_effects = game_state.get_weekly_drift_effects()
+	engine.apply_bounded_cashflow_stress_drift(game_state)
+	if game_state.stress - stress_before > engine.MAX_CRISIS_DRIFT_STRESS_INCREASE:
+		errors.append("cashflow crisis weekly drift should respect the stress feedback cap")
+
 func _validate_monthly_rent(game_state: Node, errors: Array[String]) -> void:
 	game_state.reset()
 	game_state.week = 1

title: Cohort A · cashflow crisis stress feedback
